examples: Why are you in such a big hurry?
There is no hurry on that paperwork.

definitions.text: An incidence of a defensive pressure that forces the quarterback to throw the ball earlier than intended or rush their decision, often leading to an incomplete pass or failed play.
Often with up, to speed up the rate of doing something.
examples: If you don't hurry (up) you won't finish on time.

definitions.text: To cause to be done quickly.
